steps.title: Check current vllm setup
steps.description:
Verify your vLLM version and configuration:
```bash
pip show vllm | grep Version
```
This feature requires a working vLLM installation with GPU support.

steps.title: Review vllm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vllm configuration:
### The model to consider.

https://huggingface.co/jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3   jina-embeddings-v3 is a multilingual multi-task text embedding model designed for a variety of NLP applications.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [New Model]: jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3
steps.description:
Apply the changes to add jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3 model support:
1. jina-embeddings-v3 uses the same weights name as jina-reranker-v2
2. jina-embeddings-v3 uses rotary position embeddings (not absolute)
3. Use `is_matryoshka` and `matryoshka_dimensions` to determine whether the model supports matryoshka representations
4. jina-embeddings-v3 supports five tasks through LoRA adapters (e.g., retrieval.query for queries)

See the [source PR](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/16120) for the full implementation.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "[New Model]: jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Added jinaai/jina-embeddings-v3 model support to vLLM. Key changes: reuses jina-reranker-v2 weight names, uses rotary position embeddings, adds matryoshka representation support, and enables five LoRA-based task adapters.

prerequisites.description: A working vLLM installation with GPU support (CUDA). Install via: pip install vllm
